prompt: Cinematic dark reveal: glowing purple light cuts through darkness, abstract probability curves materialize, bold white text emerges — 'Quantify every trade with probability math.' Dramatic, premium, slow push-in.
Sleek smartphone held in hand against dark studio backdrop, screen displays 交易期望值计算器 app, finger taps asset price field, types '42000', purple accent highlights the input elegantly.
Close-up overhead shot, premium smartphone on dark surface, finger confidently taps position size field on the app interface, entering '5', subtle purple glow pulses around the active input.
Smooth slow-motion scroll on smartphone screen, 价格目标与概率分布 section glides into frame, target price and probability columns revealed with cinematic depth-of-field and soft purple ambient light.
Extreme close-up of smartphone screen, finger precisely enters take-profit price target into the app's input field, numbers populate with crisp clarity, purple highlight animates across the row.
Dramatic low-angle smartphone shot, thumb hovers then taps the calculate button, screen flashes with purple light, expected value result materializes instantly — bold, glowing, decisive.
Clean midnight background, EV Calculator logo fades in centered with soft purple radiance, tagline 'Quantify every trade with probability math' types on, 'Try it free' pulses gently below.
